arxiv.title: Agentic workflows for message-first research systems
arxiv.summary: A concise pattern for separating retrieval, synthesis, and delivery in chat-driven agents.

arxiv.title: Low-latency orchestration for collaborative LLM swarms
arxiv.summary: Shows how bounded concurrency and explicit handoff contracts reduce chat tool drift.

hackernews.title: Practical lessons from building WhatsApp-native assistants
What made our multi-agent setup reliable in production

grok.summaryLead: Grok synthesis says the safest MVP is one that always research-checks three layers: academic signal, practitioner signal, and a short synthesis pass.
grok.caution: Keep the response short enough for WhatsApp and persist the evidence trail before any handoff.
